# hooks-auth-current-user-agent

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query query hook for currentUserAgent

## Usage

```typescript
useCurrentUserAgentQuery()
```

## Examples

### Use useCurrentUserAgentQuery

```typescript
const { data, isLoading } = useCurrentUserAgentQuery();
```
